title: Campaign Definition
description: Schema for a BAR campaign definition file.

identifier.description: An identifier that starts with a letter and contains only letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens.

$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON Schema for this file.

description.description: Short description shown in the campaign selection UI.

backgroundImage.description: Filename of the background image used on the campaign screen.

logo.description: Filename of the campaign / faction logo image.

prerequisites.description: List of campaign IDs that must be completed before this one is unlocked.

difficulties.description: Map of difficulty names to their settings.

playerHandicap.description: Handicap percentage applied to players (positive for bonus, default 0)

enemyHandicap.description: Handicap percentage applied to enemy AI (positive for bonus, default 0)

defaultDifficulty.description: Name of the difficulty selected by default; must match one entry in 'difficulties'.

unlocks.description: Map of mission IDs to their unlock requirements.

additionalProperties.description: List of mission IDs that must be completed to unlock this mission.
